summary: Snow-covered village with timber houses on stilts. Frost's trial-shrine is heated from inside. The word 'dragon' is spoken aloud for the first time in the game here.
flavor_beats: A fenced herb garden on the north wall still grows in the snow.
When Rivers walks into Frost's shrine, steam blooms off their clothes.
Frost keeps a pot of soup on a stone brazier and offers a bowl before the fight.
